name: every IaC namespace (aws/azure/gcp/hashicorp/cfn/k8s/helm/ansible/gitops/cloud-conventions) is consulted in the complete output
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-consult.sh" --emit-grounding 2>/dev/null > g.json; printf '%s' '{"pillars":{}}' > d.json; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-consult.sh" --design d.json --grounding g.json --json 2>/dev/null > out.json; node -e 'const j=require("./out.json");const iac=["aws","azure","gcp","hashicorp","cfn","k8s","helm","ansible","gitops","cloud-conventions"];process.exit(iac.every(n=>j.consulted.includes(n))?0:1)' && echo iac-namespaces-consulted 1>&2
